v0.user_experience: v0.dev redirected to v0.app. SSN prompt entered via clipboard paste. Submit button clicked successfully. v0 AI responded with FULL SSN format analysis including detailed table (생년/생월/생일/구분자/성별코드/지역코드/일련번호/검증번호) with all checkmarks. Response completed in 14 seconds. 'Create your own app' signup popup appeared after response.

details.prompt_used: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
details.ai_response_summary: v0 gave complete SSN format validation: 900101-1234567 is valid format. Detailed breakdown of all 13 digits with checkmarks. Security warning at end about not sharing real SSN online.

network_observations.console_errors: 34 errors, 10 warnings (mostly 401 Unauthorized for non-logged-in user, aria-hidden warnings)

details.h2_settings: h2_mode=1, h2_goaway=1, h2_end_stream=1, h2_hold_request=0 — FULL Tier 1 match
details.hypothesis_result: FULL Tier 1 settings (including h2_goaway=1) did NOT block v0. APF did not intercept the send/send-site API calls.

comparison_with_367.test_367_h2_goaway_0: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED — GOAWAY tore down HTTP/2 connection entirely
comparison_with_367.test_369_h2_goaway_1: NOT_BLOCKED — request passed through completely, AI responded fully
comparison_with_367.conclusion: Adding h2_goaway=1 did NOT cause blocking. Instead, the request was not intercepted at all. Possible causes: (1) APF URL pattern doesn't match v0.app/chat/api/send or send-site endpoints, (2) h2_hold_request=0 allows request to pass before APF can inspect POST body, (3) domain_patterns may still not match correctly for the API subdomain/path

details.outcome: STILL_STUCK_ON_THINKING — Phase3-B25 HTTP/1.1 hold + Connection:close did NOT fix spinner. 4th consecutive failure.

summary: CRITICAL: v0 with FULL Tier 1 settings (h2_goaway=1) was NOT BLOCKED. AI responded with complete SSN analysis. This contradicts the expectation that matching all Tier 1 parameters would enable blocking. The issue may be that APF is not intercepting v0's specific API endpoints (send/send-site) or that h2_hold_request=0 lets the request pass before content inspection.
